entries.command: rm -rf /tmp/palana-listing-corpus && mkdir -p /tmp/palana-listing-corpus && cd /tmp/palana-listing-corpus && touch plain 'with space' 'café' PALANA-LINKS && touch "$(printf 'new\nline')" && nl=$(printf '\nX') && nl=${nl%X} && touch "end${nl}" && printf x > sized && ln -s plain alink && ln -s 'with space' 'link with space' && mkdir subdir && mkdir empty

cd /tmp/palana-listing-corpus && { find . -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -exec stat -f '%HT	%z	%m	%Lp	%Su	%Sg' {} \; -print0; printf 'PALANA-LINKS\0'; find . -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type l -exec sh -c 'for f; do printf "%s\0" "$f"; readlink -n -- "$f"; printf "\0"; done' palana {} +; }
